subject: Refund for accidental annual upgrade
body: Hi, I meant to renew my monthly plan but it looks like I got charged for the annual plan instead - $240 instead of $24. Can I get this reversed and put back on monthly? This just happened today.

subject: Can't log in after password reset
body: I reset my password twice now using the email link but every time I try to log in it says 'invalid credentials'. I have a client presentation in an hour and all my project boards are on TaskFlow. Please help ASAP.

subject: Feature request: dark mode
body: Loving TaskFlow so far! One thing that would really help my eyes during late night work sessions is a dark mode option. Any plans to add this?

subject: Zapier integration stopped syncing
body: Our Zapier automation that creates TaskFlow cards from new Typeform submissions has stopped working since yesterday. No error message, it just silently fails. This is blocking our intake process.

subject: How do I add a team member
body: Quick question - how do I invite a new person to my workspace? I don't see an obvious button for it.

subject: Invoice missing for last month
body: We need the invoice for June 2026 for our accounting records but I can't find it anywhere in the billing section. Where can I download past invoices?

subject: Charged twice this month
body: I was charged twice on the 3rd of this month for my Pro plan subscription - $49 appears twice on my card statement. This needs to be fixed and refunded immediately, this is unacceptable.

subject: Board completely disappeared
body: One of our project boards with 3 months of work just vanished. It was there yesterday, today it's gone from the workspace. We have NOTHING backed up elsewhere. This is a disaster for our team.

subject: Question about API rate limits
body: What are the current API rate limits for the Business plan? We're building an internal tool and want to make sure we don't hit limits.

subject: Cancel my subscription
body: I'd like to cancel my subscription at the end of this billing cycle. Can you confirm how to do this or process it for me?

subject: Mobile app crashes on opening
body: The TaskFlow mobile app crashes immediately every time I try to open it on my iPhone 15, started after the last update. Android version works fine on my tablet though.

subject: Requesting bulk export feature
body: Is there a way to bulk export all our project data to CSV or Excel? We need this for a client audit next month and currently can only export one board at a time.

subject: Permission settings not saving
body: I'm trying to restrict a team member to view-only access on one board, but every time I save the permission it reverts back to full edit access after a few minutes.

subject: Upgrade to annual plan for discount
body: I saw there's a discount for annual billing - how do I switch from my current monthly plan to annual? Want to make sure I don't lose my current settings.

subject: Really unhappy with recent price increase
body: I just got notified my plan price is going up 30% next renewal with barely any notice. This feels like a bait and switch honestly. I've been a loyal customer for 2 years and this is how you treat us?

subject: Two-factor authentication setup help
body: How do I enable two-factor authentication for my account? I want to make sure our workspace is secure since we handle client data.

subject: Notifications not sending to Slack
body: Our Slack integration for task assignment notifications used to work but nothing has come through in about a week even though tasks are being assigned normally.

subject: Can we get a custom domain feature
body: Would love the ability to use a custom domain for our team's TaskFlow workspace instead of the default taskflow.app subdomain. Is this on the roadmap?

subject: Data export before we leave
body: We've decided to move to a different tool. Before we cancel, we need to export all our project data. What formats are supported and is there a deadline before data is deleted?

subject: Login page stuck loading forever
body: The login page just spins forever and never loads, tried on Chrome and Firefox, cleared cache, still nothing. Can't get into my account at all, need this fixed today.
